CustomField.formula: CASE( $Profile.Name , 'SDA Community User', Open_Assignments_SDA__c , 'SDA Community User Readonly', Open_Assignments_SDA__c , 'New SDA Login Community User', Open_Assignments_SDA__c , 'SDA Login Community User Readonly', Open_Assignments_SDA__c , 'SPL Community User', Open_Assignments_SPL__c , 'SPL Community User Readonly', Open_Assignments_SPL__c , 'SPL Login Community User', Open_Assignments_SPL__c , 'New SPL Login Community User Readonly', Open_Assignments_SPL__c , 'Scotia Bank Community User', Open_Assignments_Scotia__c , 'Scotia Bank Community User Readonly', Open_Assignments_Scotia__c, 'New Scotia Bank Login Community User', Open_Assignments_Scotia__c , 'New Scotia Bank Login Community User Readonly', Open_Assignments_Scotia__c, Open_Assignments_CFG__c )
CustomField.label: Number of Open Assignments
